title: koeleria pyramidata
intro: Koeleria pyramidata, also known as pyramid grass or Koeler's grass, is a perennial grass species in the family Poaceae. It is native to North America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Koeleria pyramidata include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and reduce fever. Koeleria pyramidata can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, as well as being used in traditional herbal remedies.
